response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital markets domains, which are critical for this role. Their expertise in modern web and scripting technologies is impressive but not aligned with the core requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with modern languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, React).
Proven ability to work in high-performance, low-latency environments (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic).
Strong communication skills and knowledge-sharing mindset (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, especially on Windows (last C++ role was in 2014–2015).
No evident domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
Career focus has shifted toward web/mobile/AI technologies, diverging from the role's core requirements.
